summary: Well‑balanced soundboard capture of a solid 1994 set with standout China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider and a dynamic Estimated Prophet, though the Ship of Fools intro feels uneven.
review: The Miller/David Gans soundboard delivers an exceptionally clear and balanced mix that makes listening a pleasure. Set 2 shines with a jazzy China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider, a long‑running Estimated Prophet, and a great Wheel > Attics sequence, while the Ship of Fools intro is noted as a misstep. Overall the performance is enjoyable but mixed in consistency.

ai_rating.rationale: One reviewer gives a perfect 5‑star rating for the recording quality, while the other offers a moderate 3‑star view of the performance; weighted averaging yields ~3.6 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Balanced mix with clear instrument separation; no reported dropouts or muffiness, captures the ambience of the night.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Set 2 is highlighted for its dynamic jams and jazzy middle section, with smooth transitions especially into Wheel>Attics; the intro to Ship of Fools feels a bit sloppy.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Blend with keyboards noted as strong; however his intro on Ship of Fools was described as 'sunk'.
band_member_comments.Keys: Bobby, Vince and Jerry create a jazzy middle section; keyboards blend well throughout the set.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drums>Space segment described as quite nice after earlier spring performances.
